name: Velvet Chicken Satays with Fresh Cilantro Chu
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 cups lightly packed fresh cilantro leaves
1 cup lightly packed fresh mint leaves
1 lb boneless skinless chicken breasts, cut into 1/2 inch strips
recipeInstructions:
Chutney: Process the first 8 ingredients in a blender until herbs are finely chopped. Season to taste with salt and pepper. (Can be made one day ahead. Cover and chill.)
Chicken: Whisk together the dry white wine, soy sauce, cornstarch, garlic, and egg white in a medium bowl. Add chicken and toss to coat evenly. Cover and refrigerate for approximately 2 hours. Preheat oven to 350°F.
1. Thread chicken onto skewers.
2. Transfer to a baking sheet.
3. Sprinkle chicken with sesame seeds.
4. Bake until chicken is just cooked through, about 10-15 minutes.
5. Arrange on a platter and serve with chutney.
